title: President Trump is pushing Darline Graham, the sister of the late Sen. Lindsey Graham, to serve as an interim replacement in the Senate after the longtime lawmaker’s death
In Washington, Sen. Lindsey Graham was a power broker. In South Carolina, he was “Just Lindsey.” Now friends and neighbors are mourning the senator who never stopped coming home.
